council_result: S123 Full 3-way Council (Grok DISRUPTOR grok-4.20-reasoning + Gemini AUDITOR gemini-3.1-pro-preview), R1 parallel -> R2 Claude convergence. HEADLINE: both seats voted (B) bit-exact bot serialization on the shared claim '(A) fresh-from-seed breaks the byte-identical differential gate' -> EMPIRICALLY REFUTED by reading workerSim.differential.test.ts:117-128,191-196 (gate is fresh-vs-fresh from a pristine un-ticked world, bit-exact adoption asserted BEFORE any tick; NOT a runtime handoff) -> (A) ADOPTED, (B) kernel logged as carry-forward (expose mulberry32 word only if replay/spectator-of-bot-state ever ships). ADOPTED: Gemini cross-mode e2e matrix (host worker=1 x joiner worker=0 proves wire format execution-model-independent), Gemini structuredClone silent-freeze guard (solo-bots e2e asserts structural snapshot progress), P3 instrument synthesis (--expose-gc + window.gc() + performance.memory primary, CDP HeapProfiler optional deep-dive; measured warm-up baseline threshold, record actuals), ordering synthesis (keep P1->P2->P3 but P3 runs non-bot baseline FIRST then bots run). REJECTED (logged): invert-adoption-model, message-replay-instead-of-WebRTC, incremental hash, SimulationMode enum, NullBotManager, 20Hz combat batching. PRIME-AUDIT: botSeats survives save/restore (save.ts:688,979) so worker knows it's a bots match; main must capture difficulties[] at adoption for INIT; vsBots probe relocation downgraded OPTIONAL (e2e asserts bot-authored world changes instead). No vetoes. Confidence HIGH. 13th #empirical-refutes-plausible-criticals instance (both external seats simultaneously).

priorities.label: VS-BOTS worker support: botDifficulties[] -> WorkerInitMsg, makeWorkerSim builds BotManager(difficulties, matchSeed) fresh-from-seed (Council-resolved A), applyTickBatch wires deps.botManager, drop the botSeats.size===0 adoption exclusion, capture difficulties[] at adoption in main.ts. Tests: bots differential HARD gate scenario + solo-bots ?worker=1 e2e (bot-authored primitive lands + structural snapshot progress + 0 hash mismatches) + INIT bot-config round-trip unit.

Networked worker-duel e2e (e2e/worker-duel.spec.ts): 2-peer real WebRTC, TWO permutations — host ?worker=1 x joiner ?worker=1 AND host ?worker=1 x joiner ?worker=0 (Gemini cross-mode ADOPTED). Assert: host simWorker ready+!failed, hashMismatches===0, joiner converges (host-authored primitive appears), worker-built snapshots are the wire snapshots (~10Hz), zero page errors.

10k-frame GC/heap audit (e2e/worker-heap.spec.ts): --expose-gc + window.gc() + performance.memory (CDP optional), TD-heavy seeded world, NON-BOT baseline run FIRST then bots run (Grok ordering kernel), warm-up baseline threshold, assert bounded post-GC growth + record actual numbers; fix any leak found (small, in-scope).

OWNER SCOPE AMENDMENT (Rule 16, approved same-message): research + design doc (NO gameplay code) for difficulty-tiered bot GAME KNOWLEDGE: (a) tier-gated combo/recipe books (harder bots know+seek TD structures and godly combos), (b) leader-awareness + raid-the-winner targeting, (c) sacrifice play (delete own constructions when it enables a better combination), (d) how these bind into the existing botBrain/botConfig FSM + determinism constraints. Output: BOT_INTELLIGENCE_DESIGN.md for owner review + Council consideration pass.
